description_long: This is a triangular slice of cake featuring a golden-brown, slightly crumbly base topped with a generous layer of white whipped cream. The surface is adorned with fresh raspberries and halved strawberries, some of which are dusted with powdered sugar, and a few pieces of green pistachio for added color and texture. The cream appears thick and soft, slightly oozing over the edges of the base. The fruit toppings are vibrant and glossy, providing a striking contrast to the creamy white layer beneath. The cake slice is presented without any visible plate or container, and the base appears to be a single, thin layer. The overall appearance is rustic and inviting, with a focus on fresh, natural ingredients.
description: A rustic triangular cake slice with a golden base, topped with whipped cream, fresh raspberries, strawberries, and pistachios.
description_view_0: This view highlights the front corner of the cake slice, showing the thick whipped cream and a prominent strawberry on top, with raspberries clustered around.
description_view_1: The side profile reveals the single-layer base, the thickness of the cream, and a clear view of the fruit and pistachio toppings.
description_view_2: This angle emphasizes the abundance of raspberries and the way the cream drapes over the edge of the cake base.
description_view_3: The back view shows the distribution of fruit across the top and the evenness of the cream layer, with the base visible along the bottom edge.
